
### indirect branch prediction  {.smaller}


* <code>jmp *%rax</code> or <code>jmp *(%rax, %rcx, 8)</code>
* BTB can provide a prediction
* but can do better with more context
* example---predict based on other recent computed jumps 

   * good for polymophic method calls
 
<hr class="vspace" />
* table lookup with Hash(last few jmps) <br> instead of Hash(this jmp)
